properties.Test Case: Ensure you can copy a translation bubble. [N.B. we are willing to live with BL-10294.]
properties.Steps: Ensure you can copy a translation bubble. [N.B. we are willing to live with BL-10294.]

properties.Test Case: Test selecting different pages for a book with many pages: Select a new page. Ensure list doesn't jump (BL-11528). Try dragging the scroll bar to move thumbnails. Observe memory performance.
properties.Steps: Test selecting different pages for a book with many pages: Select a new page. Ensure list doesn't jump (BL-11528). Try dragging the scroll bar to move thumbnails. Observe memory performance.

properties.Test Case: Create a book with a special/unique font which Harvester knows about. The Harvester should succeed, and the book should be able to be read online with that font. Downloaded ePUB and BloomPub books should contain the font so that they can be read with it. If the font was used in a style, then the style in a downloaded book should still refer to the font even if hasn't been installed. [Noto Sans Tamil from Google fonts is one that Harvester knows about. Scheherazade New from SIL is another such font.]
properties.Steps: Create a book with a special/unique font which Harvester knows about.  The Harvester should succeed, and the book should be able to be read online with that font.  Downloaded ePUB and BloomPub books should contain the font so that they can be read with it.  If the font was used in a style, then the style in a downloaded book should still refer to the font even if hasn't been installed.  [Noto Sans Tamil from Google fonts is one that Harvester knows about.  Scheherazade New from SIL is another such font.]

properties.Test Case: Create a book with a special/unique font which Harvester does not know about. The Harvester should fail and Blorg should show a message like this, but the PDF should work.
properties.Steps: Create a book with a special/unique font which Harvester does not know about. The Harvester should fail and Blorg should show a message like this, but the PDF should work.

properties.Test Case: Verify that the book thumbnail on Library is just the image of the front cover. [JT: I think it's sufficient to upload a book (to our 'sandbox', dev.bloomlibrary.org), follow the link to the resulting book, and check that the thumbnail just look like the front cover picture. For example, it doesn't have the title (not on inside the rectangle that has the cove-color background, anyway or any of the other text, and the size and shape match the picture rather than the whole cover.]
